system.descriptor: Tactics is the practical application of military knowledge in the field of battle. It relates directly to on-the-ground combat manoeuvres and actions rather than a broad theoretical or strategic view of warfare.
system.uses:
Skill Groups: Air Combat, Armoured Tactics, Assault Doctrine, Defensive Doctrine, Orbital Drop Procedures, Recon and Stealth.
A character can use Tactics at any time when he wants to determine the best military course of action in a combat.
Air Combat: Atmospheric and near-orbit engagements with fighters, close support craft, and bombers.
Armoured Tactics: The use of armour and exploitation of armoured weaknesses.
Assault Doctrine: All kinds of assaults, from bunker breaches to amphibious landings.
Defensive Doctrine: Establishing strong defensive lines, kill zones, and enfilading fire.
Orbital Drop Procedures: Knowledge of orbital drop doctrine and maximising troop concentration after landing.
Recon and Stealth: Infiltration, scouting, and concealed approach.
Special Use: A Kill-team leader may use Tactics (Recon and Stealth) in place of an opposed Concealment Test for himself or any squad member in Support Range.

description.value:
Tactics is the practical application of military knowledge in the field of battle. It differs from the Lore skills in that it relates directly to on-the-ground combat manoeuvres and actions rather than a broad theoretical or strategic view of warfare.

Skill Groups: Air Combat, Armoured Tactics, Assault Doctrine, Defensive Doctrine, Orbital Drop Procedures, Recon and Stealth
